response.justification: Although Bogdan possesses a strong technical background with extensive hands-on experience in modern software engineering and open-source development, he falls short of the executive-level leadership and consulting requirements of this role. Crucially, his basic German proficiency does not meet the strict C1 requirement, and his resume lacks evidence of formal team management, enterprise UML modeling, and client-facing architectural advisory.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience designing and building modern software systems and microservices.
Strong dedication to open-source technologies and Linux environments, highlighted by founding GISCollective.
Holds a completed university degree in Computer Science, meeting the educational requirement.
concerns: German language proficiency is listed as Basic, whereas the role strictly requires a minimum of C1.
Lacks demonstrated executive-level leadership, formal team management, and technical project management experience.
Missing experience in enterprise UML modeling, IT security/compliance, and direct client advisory.
